scripts.build: npm run type-check && npm install && next build
scripts.clear: pwsh -Command "clear; Remove-Item ./.next, ./dist, -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item package-lock.json -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
